notes: HAR-233 captured Admin GraphQL 2026-04 fulfillment-order request lifecycle behavior using a disposable API fulfillment service and fulfillmentOrderMove setup. The fixture records partial fulfillment request splitting, merchantRequests message/options payloads, accept/reject fulfillment request transitions, submit/accept/reject cancellation request transitions, invalid-id RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND branches, and cleanup attempts. Generic parity replay is intentionally runtime-test-backed because the scenario is a multi-step third-party fulfillment-service workflow with external notification side effects that local staging must not invoke.
